member.name: M:GTA.Math.Vector3.DistanceSquared2D(GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3)
member.summary: Calculates the squared distance between two vectors, ignoring the Z-component.
member.param: The first vector to calculate the squared distance to the second vector.
The second vector to calculate the squared distance to the first vector.
member.returns: The squared distance between the two vectors.
